vehicles.name: Maruti Suzuki Dzire
vehicles.subtitle: Economical City Sedan
vehicles.description: Perfect for solo travelers and couples. Fuel-efficient sedan with comfortable seating for short city trips and affordable rates.

vehicles.name: Toyota Etios
vehicles.subtitle: Reliable Compact Sedan
vehicles.description: Known for reliability and fuel efficiency. Ideal for small groups and daily commutes with sturdy construction and dependable performance.

vehicles.name: Maruti Suzuki Ciaz
vehicles.subtitle: Premium Sedan for Business
vehicles.description: Spacious premium sedan with elegant interiors perfect for business travel and corporate meets. Offers superior comfort for longer city journeys.

vehicles.name: Hyundai Aura
vehicles.subtitle: Modern Compact Sedan
vehicles.description: Modern design with contemporary features, ideal for couples and small groups. Smooth ride quality with good fuel economy for city travels.

vehicles.name: Maruti Suzuki Ertiga
vehicles.subtitle: Spacious 6-Seater MPV
vehicles.description: Versatile MPV perfect for small families and groups of 5-6 people. Comfortable seating with good boot space for luggage on weekend getaways.

vehicles.name: Toyota Innova
vehicles.subtitle: Popular Workhorse SUV
vehicles.description: India's most trusted 6-seater SUV, renowned for durability and comfort. Ideal for medium group trips with excellent fuel efficiency and road stability.

vehicles.name: Toyota Innova Crysta
vehicles.subtitle: Premium Luxury SUV
vehicles.description: Premium 6-seater with enhanced interiors and comfort features. Perfect for longer journeys and special occasions with superior ride quality.

vehicles.name: Toyota Innova Hycross
vehicles.subtitle: Advanced Hybrid MPV
vehicles.description: Latest generation hybrid MPV with cutting-edge features. Exceptional fuel efficiency and modern technology for eco-conscious travelers.

vehicles.name: Kia Seltos
vehicles.subtitle: Stylish Compact SUV
vehicles.description: Modern 5-seater SUV with sleek design and advanced features. Great ground clearance and comfortable seating for small group adventures.

vehicles.name: Tempo Traveller
vehicles.subtitle: Affordable Large Group Coach
vehicles.description: Spacious coach available in 12, 17, or 24-seater configurations. Perfect for large group tours, corporate outings, and budget-friendly pilgrimages.

vehicles.name: Luxury Force Urbania
vehicles.subtitle: Premium 12-Seater Coach
vehicles.description: Ultra-luxury coach with premium seating and modern amenities. Ideal for corporate travels, VIP tours, and executive group transportation.

vehicles.name: Urbania Standard
vehicles.subtitle: Standard 17-Seater Coach
vehicles.description: Comfortable 17-seater coach ideal for large group tours and long-distance travel. Reliable and economical option for extended group journeys.
